历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 1294 → 3067 → 787 → 2301 → 2641, with significant fluctuations. In 2022, rankings dropped sharply due to changes in exam difficulty, but rebounded strongly to 787 in 2023, stabilizing in the 2300–2640 range in 2024–2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2641. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Heilongjiang: 51 in 2021, 54 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 49 in 2025. The 2026 physics category plan is 36, a decrease of 13 from 2025 (a reduction of about 26.5%), easing competition pressure and potentially moving rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 10th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, firmly among the top universities in China, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), but the impact is limited. Its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 24th (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms. Historically, there have been no obvious records of enrollment gaps, maintaining stable overall application attention. It has 4 A+ disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 7 A disciplines (Mechanics, Business Administration, Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Marxist Theory), and 2 A- disciplines (Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology). Its flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Mechanical Engineering highly overlap with currently popular social majors, enhancing application attractiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, closely matching Xi'an Jiaotong University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Heilongjiang is 167,000, slightly increased from 2025 (163,114), but the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 112,725, a decrease of about 4% from 2025 (117,407), slightly easing competition. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, in the northwest region. Candidates from Heilongjiang have a strong willingness to apply to C9 universities across provinces, and as a C9 member located in a provincial capital, the university has good regional acceptance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering key factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2641, the significant reduction in the 2026 physics category enrollment plan (49→36, -26.5%), a slight decrease in physics category candidates in Heilongjiang, and the sustained high popularity of the university's top tier and flagship majors, the enrollment reduction primarily drives rankings forward (easier admission), but the university's high reputation and popular majors still maintain strong competition. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 2251, with a range of 1981–2521.

Those within the range (1981–2521) can focus on challenging Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes, while Tier 1 Qian Xuesen Classes/Leading Classes require rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 1981) to attempt. 历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical programs in Heilongjiang Province over the past five years are: 2021: 3960th (planned 19 students), 2022: 2633rd (planned 14 students), 2023: 3454th (planned 14 students), 2024: 3649th (planned 13 students), 2025: 5669th (planned 13 students). From 2021 to 2022, the ranking significantly moved forward (dropped by 1327 places), in 2023 it fell back (rose by 821 places), in 2024 it remained basically stable (rose by 195 places), and in 2025 it notably moved backward (rose by 2020 places), setting the lowest ranking in the past five years. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 13 students, consistent with 2024 and 2025, a reduction of about 32% compared to 2021 (19 students) and a reduction of 1 student compared to 2022-2023 (14 students). The plan has been stable at 13 students for three consecutive years, with no expansion factor driving the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, one of the first batch of key construction universities in the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a national 'Double First-Class' construction university (Class A). The university has strong comprehensive strength, the medical department has a long history, and disciplines such as clinical medicine and basic medicine enjoy a high reputation in China, with sustained appeal to candidates in Heilongjiang Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has been rising nationwide, and candidates in Heilongjiang Province have a particularly strong preference for medical departments of 985 universities. Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical programs have a small enrollment scale in Heilongjiang (usually 13-19 students), and the scarcity further increases competition. The significant backward movement of the ranking in 2025 (5669th) reflects that the popularity of medical programs in Heilongjiang reached a peak in recent years, and it is expected that the popularity will remain high but slightly adjust in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical programs in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 will be approximately 5629th, a slight forward movement of about 40 places compared to 2025 (5669th), reflecting a reasonable adjustment after the large jump in 2025. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 5460th and 5798th, and candidates within this range have a high probability of being admitted.

The admission rankings for Clinical Medicine (Hou Zonglian Class) and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) are much higher than the minimum line for the university's medical programs, requiring high-scoring candidates to attempt; the regular Clinical Medicine class and Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Category) are of moderate difficulty; the Medical Experimental Class (Medical Category) is a relatively safe choice.
